name: DebouceInput
description: An input component that debounces onChange events to reduce the frequency of updates, ideal for search inputs and performance optimization.
usage_guidelines: Use for search inputs to reduce API calls.
Use for inputs that trigger expensive operations.
Set appropriate wait time based on use case (default 500ms).
Inherits all Input component props and functionality.

wait.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds before triggering onChange.

styling_info.visual_description: Identical to standard Input component. Debouncing is a behavioral enhancement, not visual.

Do: Set appropriate wait time (300-500ms for search)
Use for inputs triggering API calls
Dont: Don't use for critical immediate inputs
Don't set wait time too long
Don't use for simple form fields

Example.title: Example
